PETITION TO DETERMINE SUCCESSION TO REAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Jun-07-2023 Off Calendar

PETITION TO DETERMINE SUCCESSION TO REAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Mar-27-2023 Continued To Jun-12-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION TO DETERMINE SUCCESSION TO REAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Jan-30-2023 Continued To Mar-27-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION TO DETERMINE SUCCESSION TO REAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Nov-21-2022 Continued To Jan-30-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: David Bennett, via Zoom, in propria persona, Petitioner.

The court and Mr. Bennett discuss the status of this matter and of the delay in moving it forward. Upon query from the court regarding the co-op's position, Mr. Bennett reports that the co-op has requested he obtain a small estate affidavit and an appraisal from the probate referee so that he can sell the decedent's share in the co-op. The court suggests that Mr. Bennett may not require an order from this court if he proceeds via the small estate route. Mr. Bennett advises that he is discussing the preceding with Open Door Legal. The court suggests that the Sacramento Law Library website might be a good resource for additional information.

After additional discussion, the matter is continued to Jan-30-2023 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204. Mr. Bennett is instructed to advise the court before the next calling if he finds that he no longer requires an order from the court.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.

PETITION TO DETERMINE SUCCESSION TO REAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Oct-10-2022 Continued To Nov-21-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: David Bennett, via Zoom, in propria persona, Petitioner.

The court and Mr. Bennett discuss the delay in resolving this matter. Mr. Bennett advises that he has discussed this matter with several attorneys who've advised that they could not assist him due to the value of the estate's share of a co-op which he believes to be $20k. The court suggests that petitioner address the court's queries via a declaration on judicial council form MC-030 and discusses with him what information the court is looing for specifically regarding confirmation of his relationship to the decedent, confirmation of whether the decedent had any children, and to clarify what exactly the co-op is requesting. The court advises petitioner to also submit a completed Judicial Council form DE-315, Order Determining Succession to Real Property.

The matter is continued to Nov-21-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Cristobal. Not Reported.

PETITION TO DETERMINE SUCCESSION TO REAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Jul-25-2022 Continued To Oct-10-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: David Bennett, via Zoom, in propria persona, Petitioner.

The court confirms with Mr. Bennett that he is searching for an attorney in the San Francisco area to assist him with this matter. The court provides Mr. Bennett with the phone number to the SF Bar Association's lawyer referral service.

The matter is continued to Oct-10-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.
